install_addon.title: Install OpenVPN Add-on
install_addon.description:
The OpenVPN add-on needs to be installed first.

**Quick Setup:**
1. Go to Settings → Add-ons → Add-on Store
2. Click menu (⋮) → Repositories
3. Add: https://github.com/skifahrer/openvpn-in-homeassistant
4. Install and Start the OpenVPN Manager add-on
5. Come back here and click Submit

**Already installed?** Make sure the add-on is Started, then click Submit below.

upload.title: Upload Your VPN File
upload.description:
**Almost done!** Now upload your .ovpn file:

**Method 1 - Via Add-on (Easiest):**
1. Settings → Add-ons → OpenVPN Manager
2. Click 'Files' tab
3. Open /data/configs/ folder
4. Click upload icon, select your .ovpn file

**Method 2 - Via URL:**
If your .ovpn file is at a URL, paste it below.

**After uploading:** A VPN switch will appear on your dashboard!

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to OpenVPN add-on. Make sure it's installed and started.

abort.addon_not_running: Add-on is not running. Please start it in Settings → Add-ons → OpenVPN Manager, then try again.
